name: RFC 7516 A.3 - A128KW worked example is rejected (no typ)
description: The deterministic A128KW + A128CBC-HS256 example ('Live long and prosper.'), byte-for-byte from the RFC, with the RFC's key. Both algorithms are in the profile's allowlists, but the header carries no typ - explicit typing is mandatory, so it is rejected before decryption.
